requirement_topic.en: GOEIC Import Conformity Inspection and Customs / Telecoms Duties
requirement_topic.zh: GOEIC进口符合性检验及海关/电信关税
requirement_topic.zht: GOEIC進口符合性檢驗及海關/電信關稅

summary.en: The General Organization for Export and Import Control (GOEIC) under Egypt's Ministry of Trade and Industry conducts import conformity inspection for electronic and telecommunications equipment. Wireless devices must clear GOEIC inspection at the port of entry, which verifies that imported goods match the NTRA-approved model and comply with applicable EOS/ES standards. Egyptian customs duties apply to wireless device imports by HS code. Pre-shipment inspection by a GOEIC-approved certification body may be required for some product categories. NTRA type approval must be in place before GOEIC clearance can be granted.
summary.zh: 埃及贸易和工业部下属的进出口管制总局（GOEIC）对电子和电信设备开展进口符合性检验。无线设备须在入境口岸通过GOEIC检验，验证进口货物与NTRA批准型号一致且符合适用的EOS/ES标准。无线设备进口须按HS编码缴纳埃及关税。部分产品类别可能须由GOEIC认可的认证机构进行装船前检验。须先取得NTRA型式核准，方可获得GOEIC通关。
summary.zht: 埃及貿易和工業部下屬的進出口管制總局（GOEIC）對電子和電信設備開展進口符合性檢驗。無線裝置須在入境口岸通過GOEIC檢驗，驗證進口貨物與NTRA批准型號一致且符合適用的EOS/ES標準。無線裝置進口須按HS編碼繳納埃及關稅。部分產品類別可能須由GOEIC認可的認證機構進行裝船前檢驗。須先取得NTRA型式核准，方可獲得GOEIC通關。

standards_or_laws: Egypt Import and Export Regulations (Ministry of Trade and Industry)
GOEIC import conformity inspection procedures for electronic and telecoms equipment
Egypt Customs Law (Law No. 66 of 1963 as amended) — HS-code-based duties on wireless devices
Egypt Telecommunications Regulation Law No. 10 of 2003 (NTRA type approval prerequisite for GOEIC clearance)
EOS/ES technical standards conformity verification at customs

summary.en: China export of wireless devices requires CIQ (China Inspection and Quarantine) clearance and export customs declaration. Export HS codes cover telecommunications and radio equipment. No GOEIC equivalent applies on the China export side. Chinese export documentation (CIQ certificate, commercial invoice, packing list, SRRC and CCC certificates) is required for export but does not substitute for GOEIC import conformity inspection in Egypt.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备出口须通过CIQ（中国检验检疫）清关及出口报关。出口HS编码涵盖电信和无线电设备。中国出口端无GOEIC同等机制。中国出口文件（CIQ证书、商业发票、装箱单、SRRC和CCC证书）是出口必要文件，但不能替代埃及GOEIC进口符合性检验。
summary.zht: 中國無線裝置出口須通過CIQ（中國檢驗檢疫）清關及出口報關。出口HS編碼涵蓋電信和無線電設備。中國出口端無GOEIC同等機制。中國出口文件（CIQ證書、商業發票、裝箱單、SRRC和CCC證書）是出口必要文件，但不能替代埃及GOEIC進口符合性檢驗。

standards_or_laws: China CIQ (China Inspection and Quarantine) export clearance
China Customs Law — export declaration and HS classification for wireless and telecoms devices
SRRC and CCC certificates as China-side export documentation support

gap.en: Chinese CIQ export certificates and customs declarations do not satisfy Egypt GOEIC import conformity inspection requirements. NTRA type approval must be obtained before GOEIC clearance can be achieved. Importers must budget for Egyptian customs duties on wireless device shipments by HS code and should verify current duty rates and any applicable telecommunications levies with an Egyptian customs broker before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国CIQ出口证书和报关单不满足埃及GOEIC进口符合性检验要求。须先取得NTRA型式核准，方可完成GOEIC清关。进口商须在无线设备货物中按HS编码预留埃及关税预算，并在发货前与埃及报关行核实当前税率及适用的电信附加税。
gap.zht: 中國CIQ出口證書和報關單不滿足埃及GOEIC進口符合性檢驗要求。須先取得NTRA型式核准，方可完成GOEIC清關。進口商須在無線裝置貨物中按HS編碼預留埃及關稅預算，並在發貨前與埃及報關行核實當前稅率及適用的電信附加稅。

source.publisher: GOEIC — General Organization for Export and Import Control (Egypt)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GOEIC import conformity inspection is a mandatory customs clearance step for wireless and telecoms equipment entering Egypt. NTRA type approval must be in place before GOEIC clearance. Chinese CIQ export documentation does not satisfy GOEIC requirements. Egyptian customs duties by HS code and any applicable telecommunications levies must be factored into import cost planning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GOEIC进口符合性检验是进入埃及的无线及电信设备的强制性海关清关环节。须事先取得NTRA型式核准，方可完成GOEIC清关。中国CIQ出口文件不满足GOEIC要求。进口成本规划须考虑按HS编码计算的埃及关税及适用的电信附加税。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GOEIC進口符合性檢驗是進入埃及的無線及電信設備的強制性海關清關環節。須事先取得NTRA型式核准，方可完成GOEIC清關。中國CIQ出口文件不滿足GOEIC要求。進口成本規劃須考慮按HS編碼計算的埃及關稅及適用的電信附加稅。
